name: Remote Thread Creation in Suspicious Targets
notes:
This rule detects a remote thread creation in suspicious target images.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Remote Thread Creation in Suspicious Targets
SIGMA Description: Detects a remote thread creation in suspicious target images


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread

when the event matches LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'mspaint.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'calc.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'notepad.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'sethc.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'write.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'wordpad.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'explorer.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'taskmgr.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'rdpclip.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'wermgr.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ping.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'onedrivesetup.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'dxdiag.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'mobsync.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'msra.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'xwizard.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches Start Function (custom) contains any of EtwpNotificationThread
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") MATCHES '.*\\Application Files\\.*' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") MATCHES '.*\\Application Files (x86)\\.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Remote Thread Creation in Suspicious Targets on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread

AND when the event matches LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'mspaint.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'calc.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'notepad.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'sethc.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'write.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'wordpad.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'explorer.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'taskmgr.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'rdpclip.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'wermgr.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ping.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'onedrivesetup.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'dxdiag.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'mobsync.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'msra.exe' or LOWER("Target Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'xwizard.exe' AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches Start Function (custom) contains any of EtwpNotificationThread
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") MATCHES '.*\\Application Files\\.*' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") MATCHES '.*\\Application Files (x86)\\.*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Remote Thread Creation in Suspicious Targets
Event description: Detects a remote thread creation in suspicious target images.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
